UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: User profile data including role and premium status.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

isPro.description: Whether the user has a premium subscription.

ChatSession.title: Chat Session
ChatSession.description: A container for a series of chat messages.

title.description: The title of the chat session.

lastMessage.description: The content of the last message in the session.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A single message in a chat session.

content.description: The text content of the message.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL for an attached image.

fileName.description: Optional name for an attached file.

PremiumRequest.title: Premium Request
PremiumRequest.description: A request for a premium upgrade.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user making the request.

paymentCode.description: The payment code provided by the user.

qrCodeUrl.description: The URL of the payment QR code.

GlobalMessage.title: Global Message
GlobalMessage.description: A message sent in the global world chat.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the sender.

name.description: The display name of the sender.

photoURL.description: The URL of the sender's profile photo.

text.description: The text content of the message.

image.description: Optional base64 or URL for an attached image.

/chats/{uid}/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Stores chat sessions for a user.

/chats/{uid}/sessions/{sessionId}/messag.description: Stores individual messages within a chat session.

/system/config.description: Stores system-wide configuration like QR code URLs.

/global_messages/{messageId}.description: Stores messages for the global world chat.
